transcript: Look forward to our third panel discussion on essential pillar of healthcare transformation, embedding patient safety into institutional governance and healthcare delivery system. That is, can India institutionalize patient safety? from vulnerability standards to systematic governance. May I request our esteemed panelists to join us on the stage. Starting with the moderator of the session will be Naveen Sharma sir, Vice President and Facility Director at Fortis Shalimar Bagh Fortis Healthcare. The another one, Dr. Nareen Sehgal sir, Medical Director and Head Department of MAS, Metabolic and Biological Surgery, Sehgal New Hospital. The another one which we have is Dr. B. K. Rana. He's the founder and Dr. Mamta Kankra, who is the organizing secretary at CAHO, C A H O, Cine Consulted Department of Biochemistry.
